LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodBlasting.description: Wood-blasting advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from geothermal steam geysers and wood burned in a set of large furnaces. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. It can be put into an overdrive mode, burning more fuel but generating more power. It can also be tuned to increase the power generation even further. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied the ancient ARC generators.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodBlasting.label: wood-blasting ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodFired.description: Wood-fired advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from geothermal steam geysers and wood burned in a set of large furnaces. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied the ancient ARC generators.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodFired.label: wood-fired ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodFueled.description: Wood-fired advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from geothermal steam geysers and wood burned in a set of large furnaces. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied the ancient ARC generators.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodFueled.label: wood-fueled ARC
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodPowered.description: Wood-powered advanced reactor chamber, ARC in short, produces electricity from geothermal steam geysers and wood burned in a set of large furnaces. Originally designed by {InventorFullName}, these ARCs are incredibly rare, but also versatile and powerful. It’s an advanced generator type that can be upgraded to accept other fuel types, unlocking powerful new abilities. It can be put into an overdrive mode, burning more fuel but generating more power. Must be placed on a steam geyser and can only be constructed and upgraded by colonists who have studied the ancient ARC generators.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_WoodPowered.label: wood-powered ARC
